query:
-- Deletar itens das comandas do restaurante 30001
DELETE ti FROM tabItems ti
INNER JOIN tabs t ON ti.tabId = t.id
INNER JOIN tables tb ON t.tableId = tb.id
WHERE tb.establishmentId = 30001;

-- Deletar comandas do restaurante 30001
DELETE t FROM tabs t
INNER JOIN tables tb ON t.tableId = tb.id
WHERE tb.establishmentId = 30001;

-- Deletar itens dos pedidos do restaurante 30001
DELETE oi FROM orderItems oi
INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.establishmentId = 30001;

-- Deletar pedidos do restaurante 30001
DELETE FROM orders WHERE establishmentId = 30001;

-- Resetar status das mesas do restaurante 30001
UPDATE tables SET status = 'free', currentGuests = 0, occupiedAt = NULL WHERE establishmentId = 30001;
